---
title: "Final_Project"
output: html_document
date: "2025-05-07"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(tidyverse)
library(cluster)
library(readr)
library(scales)
library(caret)
library(ranger)
library(tidymodels)
library(parsnip)
```

```{r Cluster}
df <- read_csv("austin_listings.csv")

df_clean <- df %>%
  select(room_type, accommodates, bathrooms, bedrooms, beds, price,
         number_of_reviews, host_is_superhost) %>%
  mutate(
    price = as.numeric(gsub("[$,]", "", as.character(price))),
    host_is_superhost = as.numeric(host_is_superhost),
    room_type = as.numeric(as.factor(room_type))
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

df_scaled <- df_clean %>%
  mutate(across(everything(), scale))

k_values <- 1:10
wss <- numeric(length(k_values))

for (k in k_values) {
  kmeans_result <- kmeans(df_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)
  wss[k] <- kmeans_result$tot.withinss  
}

ggplot(data.frame(K = k_values, WSS = wss), aes(x = K, y = WSS)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "Elbow Method for Optimal K",
       x = "Number of Clusters (K)",
       y = "Within-Cluster Sum of Squares (WSS)") +
  theme_minimal()

set.seed(42)
k <- 3  
kmeans_result <- kmeans(df_scaled, centers = k, nstart = 25)

silhouette_scores <- silhouette(kmeans_result$cluster, dist(df_scaled))


plot(silhouette_scores, main = paste("Silhouette Plot for K =", k),
     col = 1:k, border = NA, # color by clusters
     xlab = "Silhouette Width", ylab = "Cluster", cex.axis = 0.7, cex.lab = 0.7)

pca_result <- prcomp(df_scaled, center = TRUE, scale. = TRUE)
pca_data <- as_tibble(pca_result$x[, 1:2])
names(pca_data) <- c("pca1", "pca2")

df_final <- bind_cols(df_clean, pca_data) %>%
  mutate(cluster = as.factor(kmeans_result$cluster))

cluster_summary <- df_final %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    count = n(),
    avg_price = round(mean(price), 2),
    avg_accommodates = round(mean(accommodates), 2),
    avg_bathrooms = round(mean(bathrooms), 2),
    avg_bedrooms = round(mean(bedrooms), 2),
    avg_beds = round(mean(beds), 2),
    avg_reviews = round(mean(number_of_reviews), 1),   
    avg_room_type_code = round(mean(room_type), 1),
    superhost_rate = round(mean(host_is_superhost) * 100, 1)
  )

print(cluster_summary)

ggplot(df_final, aes(x = pca1, y = pca2, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7, size = 3) +
  labs(title = paste("K-Means Clustering (k =", k, ") on Austin Listings"),
       x = "PCA Component 1", y = "PCA Component 2") +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2")

```

```{r Vanilla}
austin_listings <- read.csv("austin_listings.csv")
holdout_data <- read.csv("holdout_x_correct.csv")

austin_listings_clean <- austin_listings %>%
  drop_na(price, host_is_superhost, bedrooms, bathrooms, number_of_reviews)

features <- c('host_is_superhost', 'bedrooms', 'bathrooms', 'number_of_reviews')
target <- 'price'

X <- austin_listings_clean %>%
  select(all_of(features))

y <- austin_listings_clean[[target]]

set.seed(42)
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(y, p = .8, list = FALSE, times = 1)
X_train <- X[trainIndex,]
X_val <- X[-trainIndex,]
y_train <- y[trainIndex]
y_val <- y[-trainIndex]

lm_model <- lm(price ~ ., data = cbind(X_train, price = y_train))

y_pred <- predict(lm_model, X_val)

rmse <- sqrt(mean((y_pred - y_val)^2, na.rm = TRUE))

r2 <- 1 - sum((y_pred - y_val)^2) / sum((y_val - mean(y_val))^2)

mae <- mean(abs(y_pred - y_val))

threshold <- 0.10  # 10% threshold
accuracy <- mean(abs(y_pred - y_val) / y_val <= threshold) * 100

metrics_table <- tibble(
  Metric = c("RMSE", "R²", "MAE", "Accuracy"),
  Value = c(rmse, r2, mae, accuracy)
)

print(metrics_table)

holdout_data_clean <- holdout_data %>%
  select(all_of(features))

holdout_predictions <- predict(lm_model, holdout_data_clean)

holdout_data$predicted_price <- holdout_predictions

head(holdout_data[, c("id", "predicted_price")])

```

```{r Radial}

austin_listings_clean <- austin_listings %>%
  drop_na(price, host_is_superhost, bedrooms, bathrooms, number_of_reviews)

features <- c('host_is_superhost', 'bedrooms', 'bathrooms', 'number_of_reviews')
target <- 'price'

X <- austin_listings_clean %>%
  select(all_of(features))

y <- austin_listings_clean[[target]]

set.seed(42)
trainIndex <- createDataPartition(y, p = .8, list = FALSE, times = 1)
X_train <- X[trainIndex,]
X_val <- X[-trainIndex,]
y_train <- y[trainIndex]
y_val <- y[-trainIndex]

svm_model <- svm_rbf(mode = "regression", cost = 1, rbf_sigma = 0.1) %>%
  set_engine("kernlab") %>%
  fit(price ~ ., data = cbind(X_train, price = y_train))

y_pred_svm <- predict(svm_model, X_val)$.pred

if (any(is.na(y_pred_svm))) {
  print("Warning: There are NA values in the predictions.")
}

rmse_svm <- sqrt(mean((y_pred_svm - y_val)^2, na.rm = TRUE))

r2_svm <- 1 - sum((y_pred_svm - y_val)^2) / sum((y_val - mean(y_val))^2)

mae_svm <- mean(abs(y_pred_svm - y_val))

accuracy_svm <- mean(abs(y_pred_svm - y_val) / y_val <= 0.10) * 100

metrics_table_svm <- tibble(
  Metric = c("RMSE", "R²", "MAE", "Accuracy"),
  Value = c(rmse_svm, r2_svm, mae_svm, accuracy_svm)
)

print(metrics_table_svm)

holdout_data_clean <- holdout_data %>%
  select(all_of(features))

holdout_predictions_svm <- predict(svm_model, holdout_data_clean)$.pred

holdout_data$predicted_price_svm <- holdout_predictions_svm

head(holdout_data[, c("id", "predicted_price_svm")])
```

```{r Random Forest}
train_raw <- read_csv("austin_listings.csv")

train_clean <- train_raw %>%
  mutate(
    price = as.numeric(gsub("[$,]", "", price)),
    price = pmin(price, 1000),  
    log_price = log(price),
    host_is_superhost = as.factor(host_is_superhost),
    room_type = as.factor(room_type),
    bedrooms = ifelse(is.na(bedrooms), 1, bedrooms),
    bathrooms = ifelse(is.na(bathrooms), 1, bathrooms),
    number_of_reviews = ifelse(is.na(number_of_reviews), 0, number_of_reviews),
    accommodates_bedroom_ratio = accommodates / bedrooms,
    accommodates_bathroom_ratio = accommodates / bathrooms,
    price_per_bedroom = price / bedrooms,
    room_type_host_interaction = as.numeric(room_type) * as.numeric(host_is_superhost)  
  ) %>%
  select(
    log_price, accommodates, bedrooms, bathrooms, minimum_nights,
    number_of_reviews, host_is_superhost, room_type, accommodates_bedroom_ratio, 
    accommodates_bathroom_ratio, price_per_bedroom, room_type_host_interaction
  ) %>%
  drop_na()

set.seed(42)
split <- createDataPartition(train_clean$log_price, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train_set <- train_clean[split, ]
test_set  <- train_clean[-split, ]

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "cv", number = 10,     
  savePredictions = "final",
  allowParallel   = TRUE
)

grid <- expand.grid(
  mtry           = c(2, 3, 4, 5, 6), 
  splitrule      = "variance",        
  min.node.size  = c(1, 2, 5, 10)     
)

set.seed(42)

rf_best <- train(
  log_price ~ ., data = train_set,
  method = "ranger",  
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = grid,
  importance = "impurity",  
  num.trees  = 1000      
)



log_preds <- predict(rf_best, newdata = test_set)
preds     <- exp(log_preds)  
actuals   <- exp(test_set$log_price)  


rmse <- sqrt(mean((preds - actuals)^2))  
mae  <- mean(abs(preds - actuals))  
rsq  <- cor(preds, actuals)^2  

accuracy <- mean(abs(preds - actuals) / actuals <= 0.10) * 100


metrics_table <- tibble(
  Metric = c("RMSE", "MAE", "R²", "Accuracy"),
  Value = c(round(rmse, 2), round(mae, 2), round(rsq, 4), round(accuracy, 2))
)

# Print the metrics table
print(metrics_table)


holdout_raw <- read_csv("holdout_x_correct.csv")

holdout_clean <- holdout_raw %>%
  mutate(
    host_is_superhost = as.factor(host_is_superhost),
    room_type = as.factor(room_type),
    bedrooms = ifelse(is.na(bedrooms), 1, bedrooms),
    bathrooms = ifelse(is.na(bathrooms), 1, bathrooms),
    number_of_reviews = ifelse(is.na(number_of_reviews), 0, number_of_reviews),
    accommodates_bedroom_ratio = accommodates / bedrooms,
    accommodates_bathroom_ratio = accommodates / bathrooms,
    price_per_bedroom = accommodates / bedrooms,
    room_type_host_interaction = as.numeric(room_type) * as.numeric(host_is_superhost)
  ) %>%
  select(
    id, accommodates, bedrooms, bathrooms, minimum_nights,
    number_of_reviews, host_is_superhost, room_type, accommodates_bedroom_ratio, 
    accommodates_bathroom_ratio, price_per_bedroom, room_type_host_interaction
  ) %>%
  drop_na()


holdout_clean$room_type        <- factor(holdout_clean$room_type, levels = levels(train_set$room_type))
holdout_clean$host_is_superhost <- factor(holdout_clean$host_is_superhost, levels = levels(train_set$host_is_superhost))


holdout_clean$predicted_price <- exp(predict(rf_best, newdata = holdout_clean))  # Inverse log transformation


write_csv(holdout_clean %>% select(id, predicted_price), "predicted_prices_holdout.csv")


head(holdout_clean)

```
